purpose: Define Pull Request Review Evidence Object requirements before source-control mutation.
rules: PREO must bind to exact PR head_sha
PREO must classify source-control mutation risk
PREO cannot be reused for a different PR or head_sha
PREO_VALID requires all branch protection required_status_checks to resolve to emitted GitHub Actions job check-run names
Unresolved required_status_checks are governance drift and force PREO invalid with merge legitimacy NULL
